channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Government Blocks Kanye West, Leading to Wireless Festival Cancellation
item.description: This year's Wireless Festival in London has been cancelled following the UK government's decision to deny rapper Kanye West, also known as Ye, entry to the country. Officials cited that his presence w...

item.title: The Declaration of Independence as a Strategic Military and Diplomatic Tool in 1776
item.description: In the summer of 1776, as the largest British expeditionary force in history arrived in New York Harbor, George Washington read the Declaration of Independence to his troops, framing it not only as a ...

item.title: Medicare Approves 2.48% Premium Increase for Private Health Plans in 2027
item.description: The U.S. Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) has officially approved a 2.48% increase in payments to private insurers offering Medicare Advantage plans for the year 2027. This adjustment re...

item.title: US and Israel Strike Iran Amid Tensions Over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Tensions between the US, Israel, and Iran have escalated sharply as military strikes and threats dominate headlines. US and Israeli air forces hit Iranian infrastructure, targeting bridges, railways, ...

item.title: Government Will Not Fund Mama Joy’s Trip to 2026 World Cup, Says Sports Minister
item.description: South Africa's Sports Minister, Gayton McKenzie, announced that the government will not be funding superfan Mama Joy's trip to the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which is scheduled to take place across the USA,...

item.title: Hacks ends on a high note as Deborah and Ava bring the story full circle
item.description: The fifth and final season of Hacks delivers a satisfying and heartfelt conclusion to the acclaimed comedy series, centred on veteran Las Vegas stand-up Deborah Vance (Jean Smart) and her millennial w...

item.title: Supreme Court to Review House’s Impeachment Proceedings Against VP Sara Duterte
item.description: The legal battle surrounding the impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte has escalated as her challenge to the House of Representatives’ actions is now before the Supreme Court. Th...

item.title: Gachagua Calls for Respect Before Ol Kalou By-Election, Urges Pause on Politics
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has strongly criticised his successor, Kithure Kindiki, for engaging in Ol Kalou's by-election politics even before the late MP David Kiaraho is buried. Kiarah...

item.title: UK Government Blocks Kanye West's Entry, Wireless Festival Cancelled Following Controversy
item.description: The UK government has refused permission for Kanye West, now known as Ye, to enter the country, resulting in the cancellation of this summer’s Wireless Festival where he was scheduled to headline. The...

item.title: Reflections on Palestine Before the Nakba
item.description: The article reflects on photographs of Palestine before the Nakba, emphasizing that the region was once an ordinary place where people strived to live and prosper like anywhere else in the world. The ...

item.title: Memorable Freddie Mercury Performances on 'Your Face Sounds Familiar'

item.title: Blake Lively Addresses Judge's Dismissal of Most Claims in Baldoni Lawsuit
item.description: Blake Lively issued a detailed statement on Instagram following a New York City judge's decision to dismiss most of her claims against It Ends With Us co-star Justin Baldoni. The ruling, handed down r...

item.title: Artemis II crew and ISS astronauts connect from space
item.description: Di news yarn say the Artemis II astronauts wey just finish their lunar flyby don dey waka back to Earth. Dem no just dey communicate with their team on Earth, dem still manage connect with their colle...

item.title: Concerns over Trump’s fitness for office and alternative approaches for removal

item.title: West Bengal Minister Shashi Panja Questions Fairness of 2026 Assembly Polls Over Voter Deletions in Special Intensive Revision
item.description: In an interview with The Hindu, West Bengal Minister and senior Trinamool Congress leader Shashi Panja has raised serious concerns about the fairness of the upcoming 2026 West Bengal Assembly election...

item.title: Assam Police search Pawan Khera's Delhi home amid allegations, he reportedly moves to Hyderabad
item.description: An Assam Police team visited the Delhi residence of Congress leader Pawan Khera on Tuesday in connection with a case filed by Riniki Bhuyan Sharma, wife of Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma. Th...

item.title: Oshawa man faces charges after fatal fire and attempt to start another
item.description: A 23-year-old man from Oshawa, Ontario, has been arrested in connection with a fatal fire that took place in February. The man, who had been on probation for prior offences, was allegedly caught last ...

item.title: World Surf League introduces parental support and maternity wildcard for surfers
